published_prior_art.cite: Source-label invariance is standard in ICA/cumulant decompositions; no cited paper states this axis-normalized direction-preservation lemma.

repo_prior_art.cite: eid_lnsem_cumulant_id concerns conditional cumulant-transfer identification of a direct effect, not full opposite-arrow separation for a fixed bivariate LvLiNGAM.

published_prior_art.cite: ChenPengHuangEtAl2025Direction, Theorems 4.4–4.7, gives a k=m+2 rank criterion whose entries reach order 2m+3; it does not establish full-fiber separation from T_{2m+2}.
ChenHuangCaiEtAl2024 treats the one-latent higher-cumulant direction setting, not the arbitrary-m full opposite-arrow compatibility locus.

per_theorem_calls.label: Open-ended Question 3: minimal real information order

repo_prior_art.cite: eid_lnsem_cumulant_id distinguishes a failed rank witness from an information-order lower bound, but provides no bivariate real opposite-arrow twin family.

published_prior_art.cite: ChenPengHuangEtAl2025Direction supplies a sufficient orientation criterion, not a Euclidean-open real reverse-twin family matching all cumulants through 2m+1.
SchkodaRobevaDrton2024 uses higher-cumulant rank conditions for multivariate LvLiNGAM discovery, not a semialgebraic atlas of bivariate feasible opposite-arrow fibers.

novelty_flags.label: Open-ended Question 2: generic exceptional locus
novelty_flags.one_line: Its consumer—“The equations provide the population exceptional set against which a later restricted orientation test can be formulated”—names neither a paper, an applied domain, nor a specific open problem.

novelty_flags.label: Open-ended Question 4: real exceptional atlas
novelty_flags.one_line: Its consumer—“supplies a concrete domain for a later restricted testing problem”—is generic and names neither a paper, an applied domain, nor a specific open problem.

accepted_scope_caveats.label: target_estimand / honest_scope
accepted_scope_caveats.caveat: The observed-law selector is asserted only on the separated, nonzero-edge, real-feasible independent-source LvLiNGAM domain; unrestricted finite-sample orientation and dependent-latent robustness are excluded.
accepted_scope_caveats.bound_claim: D(M)=S_m(T_{2m+2}(P_M)) conditional on M in M^{sep}_{m,2m+2}.

strengthening_paths.suggestion: Replace the two generic consumers with concrete consumers: tie the exceptional-locus equations to a named restricted-orientation testing problem and tie the real atlas to an explicit finite-sample testing or model-diagnostic target.
Add worked m=1 and m=2 compactly supported source families, including truncated-moment feasibility inequalities, to make the lower-order reverse-twin route falsifiable and computationally testable.
Anchor the minimality question directly to the exact ChenPengHuangEtAl2025Direction matrix definition and identify which matrix entries produce order 2m+3.

recommended_next_step: Revise the two statement-level consumers to name concrete downstream problems, then advance this field-tier kernel to Stage 0.
